mapper.insert: insert into reconciliations ( invoice_no, bank_transaction_id, payer_name, transaction_date, transaction_amount, reconciliation_amount, match_type, description, variance_amount, reconciled_at, reconciled_by ) values ( #{invoiceNo}, #{bankTransactionId}, #{payerName}, #{transactionDate}, #{transactionAmount}, #{reconciliationAmount}, #{matchType}, #{description}, #{varianceAmount}, #{reconciledAt}, #{reconciledBy} )
